query:
SELECT 
  'Total with phone' as metric, COUNT(*) as count FROM customers WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(phone) > 0
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Phone >= 10 chars', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(phone) >= 10
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Phone < 10 chars (invalid)', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(phone) > 0 AND LENGTH(phone) < 10
UNION ALL
SELECT 'No phone', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE phone IS NULL OR LENGTH(phone) = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Duplicate phones', COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT phone) FROM customers WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(phone) >= 10;
